## Summary

Describe the change and the user-facing effect.

## Checks

- [ ] I ran `npm run build`
- [ ] I tested the change in Obsidian, or the change does not need manual plugin testing
- [ ] I preserved the Electron/ONNX build workarounds in `esbuild.config.mjs`
- [ ] I updated docs or release notes if the behavior changed

## Notes for reviewers

- Does this affect first-run model download behavior?
- Does this affect desktop-only behavior?
- Does this require extra release validation?
